title: Measuring Cups Set, Liquid Measuring Cups For 3 For Kitchen - BPA Free Plastic Set with Spout Multiple Measurement Scales (Clear)
description:
About this item
【Commonly Used 3 Size in 1 Set】The set includes 3 common sizes of measuring cups. Satisfying most cooking & baking needs; suitable for holding flour, powder, and liquid. Large（1000ml，4 cups,32 oz), medium (600ml,2.5 cups,12 oz), small(300ml,1.5 cups,20 oz).
【Clearly Visible and Readable】Extremely transparent high-quality measuring cups designed with black silk screen printing scale. Gives you a bright vision and precise measuring results.
【THREE KINDS OF SCALE】Cups, Ounce, Milliliter-Accurate and easy to read， meet your different needs.Convenience for measuring both liquid and solid substances.
【Food-grade thickend Plastic】Sturdy food-grade plastic is safe for direct food contact. Thickened plastic material makes it a very durable cup set, won't be damaged easily even when they drop to the floor.
【Cold and heat resistance】This measuring cup set can work under temperatures 0-80°C（0-176°F）， totally safe for measuring both cold and hot substances. But please notice that we don't recommend you to put it into a dishwasher because the high-pressure water may damage the measuring scale on the cups.
reviews_5s:
Little on the flimsy side, but that’s to be expected with plastic over glass.LOVE these super sturdy plastic measuring cups. They're on the smaller side, but that's why I bought them. I was tired of being clumsy and dropping my unnecessarily big glass cups. They fit perfectly in my cupboard too. Easy to pour out of. No awkwardness there.

These are still great after the dishwasher AND the labeling doesn't come off!! 15/10 stars for me!I like the way the cups stack to take up less space.Perfect for the project I have. Very good quality.Three different sizes measuring jugs.
Good price and fast Amazon delivery.

Markings are clear.

Just need to see how they hold up to long term dishwashingThe last set of measuring cups I purchased were thin and they cracked after a few months of use. This set is much thicker and I am confident they will last much longer than the last set.I like the lightweight and stackable nature of these measuring cups. It is wonderful to have extras for cooking and baking.Exactly what I was hoping for. Three stackable measuring cups in different volumes. Would buy again.I like that these are priced right for what you get! Also when you hold these in your right hand you can see the cups measurement unlike most others where you see the liters measurement!They’re great just what I was looking for
reviews_1s:
At first glance, this set seems pretty standard: a 4-cup, 2-cup, and 1-cup set. But wait—plot twist—they’re actually 4-cup, 2.5-cup, and 1.5-cup. Yeah, I scratched my head too. If you’re not paying attention, you might overshoot your measurements by blindly filling to the "top line." Surprise soup, anyone?

Out of the box, they looked great—clear, sturdy, with sharp, easy-to-read markings. But that first impression didn’t last. Within a few months, the plastic turned cloudy, and the measurements started to fade. And no, before you ask, these cups have never been in the dishwasher. They’ve only been hand-washed with a kitchen sponge and soap that rhymes with "yawn."

I had high hopes since other reviews seemed pretty enthusiastic, but I just can’t get behind anything above a 2-star rating. Yes, they technically still function, but they’ve gone from shiny new to "wow, that’s rough" in record time. I’m guessing the markings will be completely gone by the end of the year.

Look, they’re cheap—I get it. Sometimes you get what you pay for. Lesson learned. Time to move on and try another brand. My advice? Skip these and aim for something a little more durable. Unless you’re cool with cloudy cups that look like they’ve been through a war.I feel like a chump -- $11 for a set of measuring cups that can't survive the dishwasher.

Do not dishwash these. Hot water will crack the plastic they are made out of. It's definitely the wrong kind of material for these things: it's some kind of low-quality acrylic.

They're designed to last just long enough to be unable to be returned.I thought these cups would be great. I liked them at first. The measurements are clearly marked and easy to use. I only hand washed them. After about 3 months of just normal use they are all developing cracks, especially around the bottom. The large one has started to leak if I put anything liquid in it. I bought 2 sets of these and feel very unhappy about that. I'll invest in a good set of glass measuring cups.I have only used the small one. I put them in the cabinet and noticed that both large ones were cracked straight down the middle from being bumped into it. I would return them, but I bought them two months ago. They are cheap, but you don't even get your money's worth.I used this to measure warm water for oatmeal before heating and it cracked all the way through and now leaks. Ridiculous.big cup handle was brokeWhen I try to clean them, they just scratch one of them is cracked alreadyCan’t even read the markings now. Waste of moneyCheap, flimsy, cracks easily.Broke after 4 months. The handle just snapped right off. Its probably fine for light use like measuring flour and oil but didn't last for measuring out dog food.
